questionHtml: State one disadvantage of the company surveying only the first 5 % of the audience as they leave the theatre.
markschemeHtml:
any reasonable answer which suggests a biased sample (must include reason, do not accept reasons such as “sample size is too small”, or answers that simply say “not representative of entire audience” without a valid reason)                    A1

eg likely to come from the same part of the theatre OR be part of same group OR be from priority seating OR it is convenience sampling

[1 mark]

meta.title: State one disadvantage of the company surveying only the first 5 % of the audience as they leave the theatre.
